summary: Comprehensive testing of Advanced Eligibility & Member Lifecycle features completed. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features tested successfully including 4-tab Members page (Census, Reconciliation, Retro-Terms, Age-Out), metric cards, Ghost Members table, Upload TPA Feed button, Process Pending Eligibility button, Member detail modal with Audit Trail, and Claims page with pending_eligibility status filter.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - minor Recharts sizing issue

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/members/eligibility/reconciliation returns census_count, tpa_feed_count, ghost_members array, unmatched_members array, matched_count
✅ Backend: POST /api/members/eligibility/upload-tpa-feed uploads pipe-delimited TPA feed and stores in tpa_834_feed collection
✅ Backend: Reconciliation correctly identifies ghost members (on census but not in TPA feed) after feed upload
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/eligibility/retro-terms returns members with past termination_date and claims paid after
✅ Backend: POST /api/members/{id}/request-refund creates clawback ledger entry (returns 400 if no claims after term)
✅ Backend: POST /api/members/{id}/request-refund returns 404 for non-existent member
✅ Backend: POST /api/claims with unknown member_id creates claim with status=pending_eligibility and eligibility_deadline ~72hrs
✅ Backend: POST /api/claims/process-pending-eligibility processes pending claims - returns released, denied, still_pending counts
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/eligibility/age-out-alerts returns dependents turning 26 within 30 days
✅ Backend: Creating dependent with DOB 26 years minus 15 days appears in age-out alerts with correct days_until
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/{member_id}/audit-trail returns audit entries for member
✅ Backend: POST /api/members creates member AND logs 'member_added' action to member_audit_trail
✅ Backend: GET /api/members returns list of members
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/{member_id} returns member details
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/{member_id} returns 404 for non-existent member
✅ Frontend: Members page has 4 tabs: Census, Reconciliation, Retro-Terms, Age-Out
✅ Frontend: Census tab shows member table with search and clickable rows
✅ Frontend: Member detail modal shows Eligibility Audit Trail section
✅ Frontend: Reconciliation tab shows 4 metric cards (Census Count, TPA Feed Count, Ghost Members, Unmatched Members)
✅ Frontend: Reconciliation tab shows Upload TPA Feed button
✅ Frontend: Reconciliation tab shows Ghost Members table with red header when members on census but not in TPA feed
✅ Frontend: Retro-Terms tab shows 'Retro-Term Monitor & Clawback' heading
✅ Frontend: Age-Out tab shows 'Dependent Age-Out Alerts' heading with table of dependents approaching 26
✅ Frontend: 'Process Pending Eligibility' button visible on Members page header
✅ Frontend: Claims filter dropdown includes 'Pending Eligibility' status option
✅ Frontend: Claims with pending_eligibility status show orange 'Pending Elig.' badge
seed_data_creation: Test members created during testing: TEST_AGEOUT_* (dependent turning 26 in 15 days), TEST_AUDIT_* (for audit trail testing), TEST_TPA_* (TPA feed upload). Pending eligibility claims exist for UNKNOWN_* and NONEXISTENT_MEMBER_999 member IDs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advanced Eligibility & Member Lifecycle features are fully functional. Key behaviors: (1) Reconciliation: Compares members collection (census) vs tpa_834_feed collection. Upload TPA feed via POST /api/members/eligibility/upload-tpa-feed with pipe-delimited format: member_id|first_name|last_name|dob|group_id|plan_id|effective_date|termination_date. (2) Pending Eligibility: Claims for unknown members get status=pending_eligibility with 72hr deadline. Process via POST /api/claims/process-pending-eligibility - auto-releases if member now exists, auto-denies if deadline expired. (3) Retro-Term: GET /api/members/eligibility/retro-terms finds members with past termination_date and approved claims after that date. Request refund via POST /api/members/{id}/request-refund creates clawback_ledger entry. (4) Age-Out: GET /api/members/eligibility/age-out-alerts finds dependents (relationship=child/dependent) turning 26 within 30 days. (5) Audit Trail: All member changes logged to member_audit_trail collection, retrieved via GET /api/members/{member_id}/audit-trail. (6) Frontend: Members page has 4 tabs with all features working. Claims page has pending_eligibility filter option.
